checks.name: Candidate record can be created from admin UI
Create Assessment button renders a page
Assessment and question setup completed through API workaround
Assignment appears after API fallback setup
Candidate can submit assessment and see result summary
Admin analytics page reflects submitted result

findings.title: Assignment UI does not expose assessments to assign
findings.details: The admin assignment form loads, but the assessment dropdown omits the newly created assessment, so assignments cannot be completed from the browser UI.

findings.title: Logout button does not log the user out
findings.details: Clicking the admin sidebar logout button leaves portal.auth.user in localStorage and does not navigate away from the protected area.
